'''Hierko Nochet''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Babbet]] adventure guide and one-time acquaintance of [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. He was bested in [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] by Lando in [[15 ABY/Legends|15 ABY]].<ref name="Shield of Lies">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}
